mechanism: AI data center energy infrastructure demand (150-300+ TWh by 2028-2030) is predominantly US-based, creating an additional USD-denominated investment channel beyond compute hardware. Natural gas, nuclear, and grid infrastructure reinforce capital account support.
regime_dependence: Holds as long as AI data centers are predominantly US-based. CPI impact (0.06-0.24pp) is modest; capital flow channel may be more material than macro price channel.
